name: Multi-Ecosystem and Infrastructure Supply Chain Attacks
description: Supply chain attacks spanning multiple ecosystems, container registries, CI/CD, and dependencies

malicious_packages.name: rest-client
malicious_packages.notes: Ruby gem compromised. Injected code exfiltrates ENV variables including AWS keys. 2019.

malicious_packages.name: strong_password
malicious_packages.notes: Ruby gem compromised. Executed remote code. 2019.

malicious_packages.name: bootstrap-sass
malicious_packages.notes: Ruby gem backdoor. Remote code execution via cookie. 2019.

malicious_packages.name: Solarwinds.Orion.Core.BusinessLayer
malicious_packages.notes: SolarWinds Orion SUNBURST backdoor. Build system compromise. 2020.

malicious_packages.name: XZ Utils
malicious_packages.notes: liblzma/xz backdoor (CVE-2024-3094). SSH daemon targeted. Multi-year social engineering.

suspicious_packages.reason: Unofficial nightly builds often used to distribute malicious code
Unnamed forks with no clear provenance

network_iocs.context: Malicious certificate authority used in supply chain attacks

file_artifacts.context: Build cache artifacts from compromised CI
